response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided reference lyrics for the song 'BE MY FLAME'. The intro talk is manually transcribed and translated. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was fully utilized for the song performance sections (02:42-05:00). The intro talk (00:00-02:08) required 100% manual transcription and translation as the reference JSON only provided a summary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied precise audio-anchored timing for the intro talk, separating English and Japanese phrases. For the song, aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions were used to maintain synchronization with the fast-paced Eurobeat rhythm.

subtitles.original: And there's gonna be a lot of Eurobeat songs but also songs that are not Eurobeat as well, new genres as well. So, I hope you guys look forward to that.
subtitles.english: And there's gonna be a lot of Eurobeat songs but also songs that are not Eurobeat as well, new genres as well. So, I hope you guys look forward to that.

subtitles.original: ね、あの国内外の様々なクリエイターにユーロビート以外の楽曲も多数作ってもらってます。
subtitles.english: Domestic and overseas creators have made many non-Eurobeat tracks as well.

subtitles.original: A lot of new songs.
subtitles.english: A lot of new songs.

subtitles.original: And I will be performing of course, performing one of the songs for you today.
subtitles.english: And I will be performing of course, performing one of the songs for you today.

subtitles.original: 今日もね、あの1曲披露しようかなと思ってます。
subtitles.english: I'm planning to perform one song today too.

subtitles.original: Showcase yay!
subtitles.english: Showcase yay!

subtitles.original: The song I'll be showcasing for you today was written and arranged by the Eurobeat circle SOUND HOLIC-san! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: The song I'll be showcasing for you today was written and arranged by the Eurobeat circle SOUND HOLIC-san! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Yes, they're very famous for Eurobeat so I'm really glad, I'm really happy to be able to work with them. Thank you so much.
subtitles.english: Yes, they're very famous for Eurobeat so I'm really glad, I'm really happy to be able to work with them. Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: えっとね、今回披露する楽曲は、作曲、編曲、国内のユーロビートを得意とするクリエイターさん、SOUND HOLICさんでございます。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: The song I'll be performing today is composed and arranged by the domestic Eurobeat expert creators, SOUND HOLIC. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 新たなユーロビートの見せ方になると思うんで楽しみに指定て。
subtitles.english: I think it'll show a new side of Eurobeat, so please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: It's Eurobeat but there's something about it that's also not very Eurobeat, so I hope you guys know what I mean when I sing it.
subtitles.english: It's Eurobeat but there's something about it that's also not very Eurobeat, so I hope you guys know what I mean when I sing it.

subtitles.original: Yes, um, the digital release will be happening on 12 AM JST, the upcoming 12 AM JST after this. So make sure you stream it on Spotify and other streaming services. Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yes, um, the digital release will be happening on 12 AM JST, the upcoming 12 AM JST after this. So make sure you stream it on Spotify and other streaming services. Yeah!

subtitles.original: この後ね、えっとデジタルリリースも各配信サイトで行われます。えっと、0時に配信されます。
subtitles.english: After this, the digital release will also be on various streaming sites. It'll be released at midnight.

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててね。
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: すごいド派手な曲です。楽しみだ。
subtitles.english: It's a very flashy song. I'm excited.

subtitles.original: Um, and as for the details of the album, I will be um talking about that at the very end of this live, so be sure to stick till the end.
subtitles.english: Um, and as for the details of the album, I will be um talking about that at the very end of this live, so be sure to stick till the end.

subtitles.original: アルバムの詳細は、この後最後のほうでね、えっといろいろ説明しちゃうんで、最後まで見てね。
subtitles.english: I'll be explaining the album details later near the end, so watch until then.

subtitles.original: All right then.
subtitles.english: All right then.

subtitles.original: Please listen to my new song, BE MY FLAME.
subtitles.english: Please listen to my new song, BE MY FLAME.

subtitles.original: 新しい曲聞いてください、BE MY FLAME.
subtitles.english: Please listen to the new song, BE MY FLAME.

subtitles.original:
BE MY FLAME
Lyrics: Stephanie Snyder Music: Nana Takahashi
Arrangement: MasKaleido, SOUND HOLIC
subtitles.english:
[Title: BE MY FLAME]
Lyrics: Stephanie Snyder Music: Nana Takahashi
Arrangement: MasKaleido, SOUND HOLIC
